title: rubus × evagatiformis
intro: Rubus × evagatiformis, also known as the black raspberry, is a hybrid species of the Rubus genus, resulting from the cross between Rubus idaeus (red raspberry) and Rubus occidentalis (black raspberry). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds that have been shown to have potential health benefits. The health benefits of Rubus × evagatiformis include reducing the risk of certain types of cancer, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in the management of blood sugar levels. Rubus × evagatiformis is often used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures, jams, and supplements, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
